name: LinearMovement
shortDescription: Move objects on a straight line.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Move objects on a straight line.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: LinearMovement

eventsFunctions.name: SpeedX
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the speed on X axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSpeedX
eventsFunctions.description: Change the speed on X axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SpeedY
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the speed on Y axis of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSpeedY
eventsFunctions.description: Change the speed on Y axis of the object.

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Move objects ahead according to their angle.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: LinearMovementByAngle

eventsFunctions.name: Speed
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the speed of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the speed of the object.

description:
Move objects on a straight line or according to their angle.

It can be used for simple enemies or bullets. It's usually not adapted for players (other behaviors are a better choice) or bullets fired with the actions provided by the "Fire Bullet" behavior (these bullets are already moved using a force).
